subcodes.first_line: The missive from that Beloved One arrived, a fresh bounty bestowed in the days of fasting, each element receiving its befitting portion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: دستخط آنمحبوب رسید نعمت جدیدی بود که در ایام صوم عطا شد هر جزئی را رزقی لایق
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
